source.name: 非官方WARFRAME中文维基 — 资源
source.note: 中文资源名称与节点名参考自灰机wiki（warframe.huijiwiki.com），图片资源来自官方英文wiki（wiki.warframe.com）。原作者保留版权。

generalTips.title: Nekros — Desecrate
generalTips.body: Fixed 54% chance for enemies killed in a wide radius to drop additional loot. Mod for Ability Range and Efficiency. The Despoil augment makes it self-sustaining (uses health instead of energy).
generalTips.bodyZh: 杀死范围内的敌人有固定54%几率掉落额外战利品。配持续和范围模组。配掠夺者MOD后用血代替能量，可以无限释放。

generalTips.title: Hydroid — Pilfering Swarm
generalTips.body: Doubles drop chances for enemies ensnared by Tentacle Swarm. Strongest single effect, but harder to land efficiently.
generalTips.bodyZh: 被触手群困住的敌人掉落几率翻倍。单一效果最强，但效率较低。

generalTips.title: Khora — Pilfering Strangledome
generalTips.body: 65% chance for ensnared enemies to drop additional loot. Stacks with Nekros' Desecrate for huge synergy.
generalTips.bodyZh: 被困住的敌人有65%几率掉落额外战利品。与Nekros亵渎叠加效果极强。

generalTips.title: Ivara — Prowl
generalTips.body: Passively 'pickpockets' one random item per enemy. Use when focused-farming a specific drop.
generalTips.bodyZh: 被动从每个敌人偷一件随机物品。专注刷某种特定掉落物时使用。

generalTips.title: Vacuum / Fetch
generalTips.body: Sentinel mod (Vacuum, 6.5m) or pet mod (Fetch, 8.5m) auto-collects loot. Always equip one.
generalTips.bodyZh: 守护模组（真空吸取，6.5米）或宠物模组（拾取，8.5米）自动收集战利品。务必装备一个。

generalTips.title: Thief's Wit / Master Thief / Scavenge
generalTips.titleZh: 盗贼直觉 / 神偷 / 拾荒
generalTips.body: Thief's Wit reveals breakable crates on the minimap. Master Thief opens locked lockers (40%). Kubrow Scavenge mod opens 90%.
generalTips.bodyZh: 盗贼直觉在小地图显示可破坏的容器。神偷40%几率开启锁柜。Kubrow拾荒模组开锁率90%。

generalTips.title: Break everything
generalTips.body: Crates and containers drop resources. Use AoE weapons (Ignis, Bramma, Tonkor) to clear them quickly. Always explore secondary floors and side rooms.
generalTips.bodyZh: 箱子和容器都会掉资源。使用AoE武器（Ignis、Bramma、Tonkor）快速清除。务必探索二层和侧房间。

generalTips.title: Resource boosters
generalTips.body: Daily login boosters double resource drop chance, and stack with squad-mate boosters and Dark Sector bonuses.
generalTips.bodyZh: 登录奖励加成可让资源掉率翻倍，且能与队友加成、暗扇区加成叠加。

generalTips.title: Dark Sector missions
generalTips.body: All Dark Sector nodes have an additional resource drop-rate bonus that varies per mission. Always prefer the Dark Sector node when one exists for your target resource.
generalTips.bodyZh: 所有暗扇区节点都有额外的资源掉率加成（每个任务不同）。目标资源若有暗扇区节点，优先选它。

squadComposition.title: Classic Resource Farm Squad
squadComposition.body: Nova (hold Molecular Prime to speed enemies up instead of slowing — clears the map faster) + Nekros (Desecrate, ideally with Despoil) + Hydroid (Pilfering Swarm) or Khora (Pilfering Strangledome) + Trinity (Energy Vampire so the other frames can keep recasting). Modern alternative: replace Trinity with Wisp for damage buffs or Octavia for AoE clear.
squadComposition.bodyZh: Nova（长按分子裂解加速敌人，更快清图）+ Nekros（亵渎，配掠夺者）+ Hydroid（掠夺触手群）或 Khora（掠夺锁喉天罗）+ Trinity（能量吸取让其他战甲不断释放技能）。现代替代：Trinity换成Wisp增伤或Octavia用于AoE清场。

resources.name: Alloy Plate
bestNodesZh: Gabii（谷神星）— 暗扇区防御
resources.tips: Infested Dark Sectors have higher spawn rates → more drops. Bring Nekros.
resources.tipsZh: Infested 暗扇区生成率高 → 掉落更多。带 Nekros。

resources.name: Ferrite
resources.tips: Void missions drop multiple resource types — efficient. Apollodorus is the easiest early-game source.
resources.tipsZh: 虚空任务掉多种资源 — 很高效。Apollodorus 是新手最简单的来源。

resources.name: Nano Spores
bestNodesZh: Hyf（火卫二）— 暗扇区防御
resources.tips: Deimos Infested missions have the densest spawns. Nekros + Hydroid is the classic combo here.
resources.tipsZh: Deimos 的 Infested 任务出怪最密。Nekros + Hydroid 是经典组合。

resources.name: Salvage
resources.tips: Jupiter Corpus nodes drop lots of containers — break everything.
resources.tipsZh: 木星 Corpus 节点容器多 — 破坏一切。

resources.name: Circuits
resources.tips: Corpus-controlled nodes are the most reliable source.
resources.tipsZh: Corpus 控制的节点最稳定。

resources.name: Cryotic
resources.tips: Cryotic ONLY drops from Excavators. Extended runs (4+ excavators alive at once) maximize per-minute yield. Pair with a resource booster.
resources.tipsZh: 冰冻原素只从挖掘机掉落。长时间挖掘（同时维持4台以上挖掘机）效率最高。配资源加成更佳。

resources.name: Hexenon
resources.tips: Drops from Amalgam units on Jupiter Corpus tilesets.
resources.tipsZh: 从木星 Corpus 地图的 Amalgam 单位身上掉落。

resources.name: Oxium
resources.tips: Dropped exclusively by Oxium Ospreys (the round floating Corpus drones). Kill them quickly before they dive-bomb — use finishers or slash procs for clean kills. Corpus Defense/Survival missions spawn the most Ospreys.
resources.tipsZh: 仅由奥席金属侦查蜂（圆形的Corpus飞行无人机）掉落。在其俯冲冲刺前快速击杀——用处决动作或穿刺效果可确保干净击杀。Corpus防御/生存任务侦查蜂出现率最高。

resources.name: Plastids
resources.tips: Uranus nodes also drop rare Tellurium / Gallium on the side.
resources.tipsZh: 天王星节点同时还能附带稀有的碲 / 镓。

resources.name: Polymer Bundle
resources.tips: Same Uranus runs that farm Plastids also give Polymer Bundle.
resources.tipsZh: 刷塑钢的天王星任务同时也给聚合物束。

resources.name: Rubedo
resources.tips: Void missions provide consistent high-volume drops alongside Argon Crystals.
resources.tipsZh: 虚空任务稳定大量掉落，同时还附带氩结晶。

resources.name: Voidgel Orb
resources.tips: Zariman-exclusive. Drops from Void Angels and Thrax units.
resources.tipsZh: 扎里曼专属。从虚空天使和 Thrax 单位掉落。

resources.name: Argon Crystal
resources.tips: Void-exclusive. Crystals decay 24h after pickup, so farm just before you need them. Combine with Rubedo + Ferrite farming.
resources.tipsZh: 虚空专属。拾取后24小时衰减消失，所以在需要前刷。可同时刷红化结晶和铁素体。

resources.name: Control Module
resources.missionTypeZh: 生存 / 防御 / 暗杀
resources.tips: Boss assassinations have a guaranteed drop. Hyena Pack boss is fast to kill.
resources.tipsZh: BOSS暗杀任务保证掉落。鬣狗群 BOSS 速杀。

resources.name: Gallium
bestNodesZh: War（火星）— 勒奇·克里尔中尉
resources.tips: Lech Kril guarantees Gallium. Assur defense gives chance drops alongside Plastids.
resources.tipsZh: 勒奇·克里尔中尉保证掉镓。Assur 防御附带塑钢一起出。

resources.name: Morphics
resources.tips: Captain Vor is fast and guaranteed. Apollodorus is the best AFK-style farm early.
resources.tipsZh: 沃尔队长速杀且保证掉。新手期 Apollodorus 是最佳挂机刷法。

resources.name: Neural Sensors
resources.tips: Alad V boss fight is the most reliable source — quick kill, guaranteed Neural Sensor.
resources.tipsZh: 阿拉德 V BOSS战是最稳定的来源 — 速杀，保证掉神经传感器。

resources.name: Neurodes
resources.missionTypeZh: 防御 / 生存 / 暗杀
resources.tips: Lephantis guarantees Neurodes. Deimos Infested missions are great for Nekros farming runs.
resources.tipsZh: 勒芬提斯保证掉神经元。火卫二 Infested 任务是 Nekros 刷怪的好去处。

resources.name: Orokin Cell
resources.tips: Saturn Dark Sector Piscinas is the classic OC farm. Infested = more spawns.
resources.tipsZh: 土星暗扇区 Piscinas 是经典的 Orokin 电池刷法。Infested = 出怪更多。

resources.name: Tellurium
resources.tips: Uranus-exclusive on ground. Also a rare global Archwing drop on Caelus/Salacia.
resources.tipsZh: 地面战只在天王星掉落。Caelus/Salacia 的飞翼任务也是稀有全局掉落。

resources.name: Entrati Lanthorn
bestNodesZh: 火卫二 — 隔离储藏（Necramech悬赏）
resources.tips: Reward from Mother bounties and Iso Vault tiers. Needed for Necramech research.
resources.tipsZh: Mother 悬赏和隔离储藏的奖励。研究Necramech必需。

resources.name: Detonite Ampule
bestNodesZh: 大多数 Grineer 节点（水星 → 赛德娜）
resources.tips: Used in Detonite Injector (clan research). Farm passively while doing other Grineer missions.
resources.tipsZh: 用于氏族研究的引爆器。做其他Grineer任务时顺便刷。

resources.name: Fieldron Sample
resources.tips: Used in Fieldron. Drops from Corpus enemies.
resources.tipsZh: 用于力场。从Corpus敌人身上掉落。

resources.name: Mutagen Sample
resources.tips: Used in Mutagen Mass. Eris is dense with Infested for fast farming.
resources.tipsZh: 用于诱变质块。阋神星的 Infested 密度高，刷得快。

openWorld.regionZh: 夜灵平野（地球 — 希图斯）
openWorld.tips: Use a Mining Laser (Sunpoint, Advanced Nosam Cutter, etc). Higher-tier cutters reveal rarer veins. Day cycle has different ore distribution than night. Refine raw ore at Old Man Suumbaat in Cetus.
openWorld.tipsZh: 用采矿激光（日尖、高级Nosam切割器等）。高级切割器能挖到更稀有的矿。日夜循环矿点分布不同。在希图斯 Old Man Suumbaat 处精炼原矿。

openWorld.regionZh: 奥布山谷（金星 — 福尔图娜）
openWorld.tips: Cold cycle vs. Warm cycle changes spawn rates. Best mining is in Temple of Profit and Spaceport regions. Use Smoot's Cutter for the best results.
openWorld.tipsZh: 冷热循环影响出货率。利润神殿和太空港区域最适合采矿。用 Smoot 的切割器效果最佳。

openWorld.regionZh: 胚化漂流地（火卫二 — 死灵堡）
openWorld.tips: Mining nodes alternate with the Fass/Vome cycle. Some gems only spawn during Fass, others during Vome. Track the cycle via the Necralisk eye in the sky.
openWorld.tipsZh: 矿点随 Fass/Vome 循环切换。某些宝石只在 Fass 出，另一些在 Vome 出。通过死灵堡天空的眼睛判断循环。

openWorld.tips: Duviri-exclusive resources. Most drop from Duviri-side activities (Orowyrm, undercroft). Spirals (Joy/Anger/Envy/Fear/Sorrow) gate certain rewards.
openWorld.tipsZh: 杜薇莉专属资源。大部分从杜薇莉活动（Orowyrm、地窖）掉落。情绪螺旋（喜/怒/嫉/恐/悲）决定特定奖励。

empyrean.note: Railjack space-mode resources — drop from destroyed Crewships, Fighters, asteroid wreckage, and missions in Earth/Saturn/Veil/Pluto proximas.
empyrean.noteZh: 虚空领航器空间模式资源 — 从船员舰、战机、陨石残骸和地球/土星/帷幕/冥王星近域任务掉落。
